module.name: iconlist
module.description: A list where each item leads with an emoji / icon and its text. Body = one item per section, "icon Title" then optional detail.
module.aiSpec:
A FEATURE / ICON LIST — each row starts with an emoji icon, then a bold title and optional description. Good for feature highlights, benefits, principles. Block module: split the body with `<!-- @ -->`, one item per section. Begin each section with the emoji/symbol, then the text (line 1 = title, the rest = detail, Markdown). For status columns use @kanban; for a plain card grid use @grid.
Parameters: - `columns`: grid columns (1-6, default 1). Items flow into that many columns. - `color`: title colour (any CSS colour; default var(--accent-color)). - `iconsize` (small|medium|large, default medium): size of the leading icon. - `gap`: CSS grid gap between items (default 14px 20px). - `valign` (top|center, default top): vertical alignment of icon against its text.
Example: <!-- @iconlist columns: 2, iconsize: large --> 🚀 **Fast** Sub-second builds. <!-- @ --> 🔒 **Secure** Loopback-only, token auth. <!-- @end -->

param.name: columns
param.label: Columns
param.desc: Number of columns to flow the items into.

param.name: color
param.label: Title color
param.desc: Colour of each item's title line.

param.name: iconsize
param.label: Icon size
param.desc: Size of the leading emoji / icon.

param.name: gap
param.label: Gap
param.desc: CSS grid gap between items, e.g. 14px 20px.

param.name: valign
param.label: Icon alignment
param.desc: Vertical alignment of the icon against its text.

snippet.label: Icon feature list
snippet.text: <!-- @iconlist columns: 2 --> 🚀 **Fast** Sub-second incremental builds. <!-- @ --> 🔒 **Secure** Runs locally with token auth. <!-- @ --> 🧩 **Extensible** Author your own modules. <!-- @ --> 📴 **Offline** No CDN required. <!-- @end -->
snippet.description: Each section: an emoji then title + detail. columns: n for a grid.
